summary: Hot early‑80s show with a rare St. Stephen and strong song placement, but recording details are unclear
review: Fans rave about the rarity of St. Stephen and praise the set ordering – Bird Song in slot four and a ripping Jack Straw > Day Job closer – while noting the performance feels hot. No concrete information is given about the source or audio fidelity, leaving the recording quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Four reviews give consistent 4‑star scores and highlight strong musical moments; lack of technical commentary limits confidence in the recording assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviews do not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues, so recording quality cannot be confidently assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note tight song placement – Bird Song early in the set and a high‑energy Jack Straw > Day Job as the first closer – giving the concert a well‑structured, hot feel.
